# Boltcall
> AI-powered receptionist platform for local businesses

Boltcall is an AI receptionist SaaS that helps local businesses never miss a customer call, text, or website inquiry. It answers phone calls 24/7, books appointments automatically, follows up with leads via SMS, sends appointment reminders, and automates Google review requests.

## Core Features
- AI Phone Receptionist: Answers every call 24/7, qualifies leads, books appointments
- Instant Lead Reply: Responds to website form submissions in under 60 seconds
- SMS Booking Assistant: AI-powered text conversations that qualify and book
- Automated Reminders: Reduces no-shows by 30-50% with smart SMS reminders
- AI Follow-Up: Nurtures leads that don't convert immediately
- Website Chat Widget: Real-time AI chat on your website
- Google Review Automation: Automatically requests reviews after appointments
- Lead Reactivation: Re-engages cold leads with personalized outreach

## Industries Served
- HVAC companies
- Dental offices
- Plumbing companies
- Law firms
- Med spas and aesthetic clinics
- Solar installation companies
- Veterinary clinics
- And other local service businesses

## Pricing
- Starter: $99/month
- Pro: $179/month (most popular)
- Ultimate: $249/month
- Enterprise: $997/month
